tweets.text: Not sure why DB limited this study to fixed calendar months. tweets.text:
The stronger cap ex intentions doesn't mean CEO's aren't worried.  

But unlike fund managers they're less worried about a credit and more worried about a cyber event which was their top tail risk at 65% (up from 55% in Q1) overtaking "Geopolitical" which edged up to 62%. 

Pandemics, climate, and social risks all garnered 16% or less in votes.
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
The pullback in CEO confidence hasn't shown up in capex intentions though. 

“Planned business investment stayed the course in Q2, as most CEOs cited no revisions to capital investment plans. However, the share anticipating increases to capital spending plans in the next 12 https://t.co/iU0QUeZ722
